zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gloucester Claye IV於1526年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，他的父親John Thomas Clay I24歲，母親Mary Anne Onthank24歲。他於大約1555年與Elizabeth Bridges在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1525年住在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可。他去世於1576年3月8日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Gloucester Claye IV于1526年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，他的父亲John Thomas Clay I24岁，母亲Mary Anne Onthank24岁。他于大约1555年与Elizabeth Bridges在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1525年住在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。他去世于1576年3月8日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Claye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Clay
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): from Old English clǣg ‘clay’, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived in an area of clay soil, a habitational name for someone who lived in a district known as (the) Clay, such as the one in east Notinghamshire, or as a metonymic occupational name for a worker in a clay pit (see Clayman ).

History: The relatively common English name Clay had several American forebears in the 18th century. Henry Clay, born in Hanover, VA, in 1777, secretary of state for President John Quincy Adams, was descended from English ancestors who came to VA shortly after the founding of Jamestown. The revolutionary war officer Joseph Clay, also a member of the Continental Congress, was a native of Yorkshire, England, who emigrated to GA in 1760 and was a founder of the University of Georgia.

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gloucester Claye IV was born in 1526, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Thomas Clay I, was 24 and his mother, Mary Anne Onthank, was 24. He married Elizabeth Bridges about 1555, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1525. He died on 8 March 1576, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Gloucester Claye IV est né en 1526, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Thomas Clay I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Anne Onthank, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bridges environ 1555, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1525. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1576, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Gloucester Claye IV 1526 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomas Clay I 24 und seine Mutter Mary Anne Onthank 24. Er hat um 1555 in Gloucestershire, England Elizabeth Bridges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1525 hat er in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 8. März 1576 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gloucester Claye IV è nato il nel 1526 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Thomas Clay I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mary Anne Onthank, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bridges circa 1555, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1525. Morì il 8 marzo 1576, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Gloucester Claye IVが1526年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父John Thomas Clay Iは24歳，母Mary Anne Onthankは24歳であった。約1555年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでElizabeth Bridgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスに住んでいた。彼は1576年3月8日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gloucester Claye IV(이)가 1526년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Clay I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Anne Onthank(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1555년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Elizabeth Bridges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1525년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 살았다. 그는 1576년 3월 8일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gloucester Claye IV nasceu em 1526, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thomas Clay I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Anne Onthank, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bridges aproximadamente 1555, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1525. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1576, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gloucester Claye IV родился в 1526 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Thomas Clay I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Anne Onthank, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bridges около 1555 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1525 году. Он умер 8 марта 1576 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Gloucester Claye IV nació en 1526, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Thomas Clay I, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary Anne Onthank, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bridges aproximadamente 1555, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1525. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1576, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
